column1: # SAMPLE dictionary (ADR-0012/0017). To set up the internal kit:
#   copy dictionary.sample.tsv -> dictionary.tsv   and edit the real one.
# (landing.ps1 uses dictionary.tsv only; the sample is never read and updates to the
# kit never touch your real file. landing backs dictionary.tsv up to the internal
# Applied to every TEXT file on every sync. Keep keys PRECISE to avoid over-matching
# (e.g. "eliya" also matches inside "eliyahu"). Lines starting with # and blank lines ignored.
# Longer 'from' values are applied first automatically.
